response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 30+ years of broad engineering experience and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which is genuinely relevant to the role. However, the position is a director-level thought leadership role requiring recognized AI expertise, strategic customer advisory experience, and ideally postgraduate AI credentials. The resume reads as a strong senior IC with entrepreneurial instincts rather than a principal-level AI strategist with demonstrated external influence, and there is no evidence of published research, keynote-level speaking, or executive advisory work that the role demands.
strengths: 30+ years of engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — far exceeding the 15-year minimum
Active AI-agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, built multiple open-source platforms, and contributed to early-stage startups across multiple geographies
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; highest technical degree is a BS in Computer Science
No evidence of recognized external AI thought leadership — no AI publications, patents, industry advisory roles, or conference keynotes in AI/ML
Titles and scope throughout career (Staff/Senior Software Engineer) reflect deep IC work but not the director-level strategic advisory seniority this role explicitly targets
